name: Red Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons goose fat (or 3 whole bay leaves)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the onion.
2. Heat the goose fat in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the onion and sauté until translucent.
3. Add the shredded cabbage to the skillet and continue cooking, stirring occasionally, for 2 minutes or until the cabbage begins to soften.
4. Stir in the sugar, vinegar, red wine, bay leaves (if using), salt, and pepper.
5. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Serve immediately.
